## RPC contract

| RPC | gRPC | REST |
|-----|------|------|
| NetworkService/Create | (CreateNetworkRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /vpc/v1/networks |
| NetworkService/Delete | (DeleteNetworkRequest) → operation.Operation | DELETE /vpc/v1/networks/{network_id} |
| NetworkService/Get | (GetNetworkRequest) → Network | GET /vpc/v1/networks/{network_id} |
| NetworkService/List | (ListNetworksRequest) → ListNetworksResponse | GET /vpc/v1/networks |
| NetworkService/ListOperations | (ListNetworkOperationsRequest) → ListNetworkOperationsResponse | GET /vpc/v1/networks/{network_id}/operations |
| NetworkService/ListRouteTables | (ListNetworkRouteTablesRequest) → ListNetworkRouteTablesResponse | GET /vpc/v1/networks/{network_id}/route_tables |
| NetworkService/ListSecurityGroups | (ListNetworkSecurityGroupsRequest) → ListNetworkSecurityGroupsResponse | GET /vpc/v1/networks/{network_id}/security_groups |
| NetworkService/ListSubnets | (ListNetworkSubnetsRequest) → ListNetworkSubnetsResponse | GET /vpc/v1/networks/{network_id}/subnets |
| NetworkService/Move | (MoveNetworkRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /vpc/v1/networks/{network_id}:move |
| NetworkService/Update | (UpdateNetworkRequest) → operation.Operation | PATCH /vpc/v1/networks/{network_id} |
